reviews.comment:
No concurri al lugar, pero estube analizando opiniones más recientes y antiguas ,antes de hacerlo tenía pensado el concurrir ,pero veo que es más de lo mismo que fecunda en Arg, la falta de profesionalismo y seriedad en la atención al público.precios no razonables ,y disconformidad...gracias a los que se tomaron las molestias de elevar lo vivido.

(Translated by Google)
I didn't go there, but I've been looking at recent and older reviews. Before going, I was planning to, but I see it's more of the same old problem that plagues Argentina: a lack of professionalism and seriousness in customer service, unreasonable prices, and general dissatisfaction. Thanks to those who took the time to share their experiences.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OcWMwTnJSM3A2Y1hwUk1FSnpaV2xEV1dOZlZXYxAB
